description: Event trace showing system committing turn BEFORE VAD end_of_speech
issue: STT final arrives while user is still speaking, LLM starts processing before user finishes
root_cause: Turn auto-commit triggers on stt.final without waiting for VAD end_of_speech
expected_behavior: System should buffer STT final events and only commit after VAD end_of_speech

event_sequence.description: Previous turn completes - Thanks for the patience in teaching me!
STT final: 'okay now search' - STILL SPEAKING!
STT final with generation_id: 'okay now search About me' - Turn committed!
Session status: thinking - LLM is thinking
LLM phase: thinking - LLM started processing BEFORE user finished speaking!

timing_analysis.vad_end_of_speech: NEVER DETECTED - user was still speaking when turn was committed

root_cause_analysis.problem: The system committed the turn at 16:55:36 (stt.final with generation_id) but VAD had not detected end_of_speech yet
root_cause_analysis.consequence: LLM started processing 'okay now search About me' at 16:55:38 while user was still speaking
root_cause_analysis.result: User said 'never mind' but it became a NEW turn instead of interrupting the current turn
